title: Affordability calculator
text:
A simple tool that helps you understand whether your future salary can support your lifestyle in a city.
Many people look at salary but forget about rent, taxes, and everyday expenses. This calculator shows your real monthly situation.




Salary per year ($)

City
 Pittsburgh, PA Chicago, IL New York, NY Dallas, 

Monthly student loan ($)

Other monthly spending ($)



Calculate














If your remaining money is high, your lifestyle is affordable in that city.
If the number is close to zero or negative, you may need to reduce expenses, increase income, or consider a cheaper city.
This tool is a simplified estimate. Real budgets may include taxes, insurance, transportation, and other living costs.

title: About
text:
Students choose jobs based on salary, but salary alone doesn’t show real living conditions. Our tool calculates whether your income can actually support your lifestyle in different cities.
This website helps you check whether your salary can support your lifestyle in different cities.
Use the calculator to explore your budget.
